name: Garlic Lover's Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the eggplants into 1/2-inch slices and place them in a single layer on paper towels. Sprinkle with salt and let sit for 30 minutes.
2. Using a garlic press, press 6 garlic cloves into a mixing bowl. Add flour, biscuit mix, oregano, pepper, and slightly beaten egg. Mix until the batter is the consistency of pancake batter.
3. Pour half olive oil and half salad oil into a skillet over medium heat, creating a depth of about 1/4 inch. Crush four garlic cloves with the flat edge of a knife and add them to the oil. Sauté until lightly browned. Press the remaining cloves against the sides of the pan just before removing to release more of the garlic flavor.
4. Coat each eggplant slice evenly with batter. Fry, being careful not to burn. Serve immediately.
